name: Relocations
fields: [{"id": "fldRelocName001", "name": "Name", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Full name of the person relocating"}, {"id": "fldRelocComp01", "name": "Company", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Client company requesting the relocation"}, {"id": "fldRelocStat01", "name": "Status", "type": "singleSelect", "description": "Current status of the relocation", "options": {"choices": [{"name": "Inquiry", "color": "gray"}, {"name": "In Progress", "color": "blue"}, {"name": "Completed", "color": "green"}, {"name": "Cancelled", "color": "red"}]}}, {"id": "fldRelocOrig01", "name": "Origin", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "City the person is relocating from"}, {"id": "fldRelocDest01", "name": "Destination", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "City the person is relocating to"}, {"id": "fldRelocStart1", "name": "Move Start Date", "type": "date", "description": "Date movers begin packing/pickup"}, {"id": "fldRelocEnd001", "name": "Move End Date", "type": "date", "description": "Date of delivery at destination"}, {"id": "fldRelocCoord1", "name": "Assigned Coordinator", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "MoveOps relocation coordinator handling this move"}, {"id": "fldRelocReqs01", "name": "Special Requirements", "type": "multilineText", "description": "Any special handling, pet needs, or other requirements"}]
description: Tracks all employee relocations managed by MoveOps

name: Stipend Transactions
fields: [{"id": "fldStipEmpl001", "name": "Employee Name", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Name of the employee submitting the expense"}, {"id": "fldStipAcct001", "name": "Account", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Client company account"}, {"id": "fldStipCat0001", "name": "Expense Category", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Category of the expense"}, {"id": "fldStipAmt0001", "name": "Amount Requested", "type": "number", "description": "Dollar amount requested by the employee"}, {"id": "fldStipRcpt001", "name": "Has Receipt", "type": "checkbox", "description": "Whether a receipt was attached to the submission"}, {"id": "fldStipDate001", "name": "Date", "type": "date", "description": "Date the expense was submitted"}, {"id": "fldStipAppr001", "name": "Approval Status", "type": "singleSelect", "description": "Review status of the expense", "options": {"choices": [{"name": "Pending", "color": "yellow"}, {"name": "Approved", "color": "green"}, {"name": "Partially Approved", "color": "blue"}, {"name": "Rejected", "color": "red"}]}}, {"id": "fldStipApAm001", "name": "Approved Amount", "type": "number", "description": "Dollar amount approved (may differ from requested)"}, {"id": "fldStipNote001", "name": "Review Notes", "type": "multilineText", "description": "Reviewer notes \u2014 rejection reason, partial approval explanation, or other comments"}]
description: Tracks home-office stipend expense submissions and approvals for client employees

name: Client Accounts
fields: [{"id": "fldAcctClient1", "name": "Client", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Client company name"}, {"id": "fldAcctMgr0001", "name": "Account Manager", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "MoveOps account manager owning the relationship"}, {"id": "fldAcctStart01", "name": "Relationship Start Date", "type": "date", "description": "When the client was first onboarded"}, {"id": "fldAcctContr01", "name": "Contract Type", "type": "singleLineText", "description": "Service package the client is subscribed to"}, {"id": "fldAcctStip001", "name": "Monthly Stipend Fee", "type": "number", "description": "Monthly SaaS fee for stipend platform (null if not subscribed)"}, {"id": "fldAcctReloc01", "name": "Total Relocations", "type": "number", "description": "Total number of relocations completed or in progress for this client"}, {"id": "fldAcctStat001", "name": "Status", "type": "singleSelect", "description": "Current status of the client relationship", "options": {"choices": [{"name": "Active", "color": "green"}, {"name": "Onboarding", "color": "blue"}, {"name": "Churned", "color": "red"}, {"name": "Prospect", "color": "orange"}, {"name": "Cold Outreach", "color": "gray"}]}}, {"id": "fldAcctNote001", "name": "Notes", "type": "multilineText", "description": "Relationship context, key contacts, and account notes"}]
description: Maps client companies to their assigned MoveOps account managers with relationship details
